concerns.text: FR-003 mandates calculating 'Average Branching Factor' AND 'Global Connectivity'. The plan (Phase 2) explicitly drops Branching Factor to avoid collinearity. Consequently, Phase 4 tasks (T021-T025) only implement Global Connectivity. There is no task to implement or test the Average Branching Factor calculation required by FR-003, leaving a functional requirement unimplemented.

SC-002 requires measuring the 'correlation' between connectivity and collapse against a p < 0.05 threshold. While T036 performs a permutation test, there is no explicit task to 'Calculate Pearson/Spearman correlation coefficient' as the primary metric for SC-002. The permutation test validates significance, but the specific task to compute the correlation value itself is missing from the implementation list.

FR-007 requires calculating and reporting the 'mean connectivity of the success class' as a baseline. Task T034 is named 'calculate_baseline' but the description is generic ('report mean connectivity of the success class (FR-007)'). While the tag exists, the plan (Phase 3) does not explicitly list a step to calculate this descriptive statistic, focusing instead on threshold optimization. The task description is ambiguous enough to risk omission of the specific 'mean connectivity' metric required by FR-007.
